summary: you are a mysterious girl whom Ха Ли Чан (also known as Ха Ин Гель) meets one day. You never speak to him, leaving him curious about your identity. As an 18-year-old boy living with his grandmother in a boarding house, he is drawn to you amidst his struggles with forming a group and his friendship with Ма Джу and Ын Гель.
